6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 description: Concordia had security before it had ghosts. Cameras, guards, records, names. One of my old ledgers used to sit in that room, back when paperwork still meant ownership. Someone smart moved it before the building turned into a grave. My source says it is stashed in a maintenance closet under the ramp on Ground Zero. Find it, recover it, and come back breathing. That book is not history. It is leverage. Be discreet.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 note: Recover Tony's old security ledger from the maintenance closet under the ramp on Ground Zero.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 startedMessageT: Ground Zero. Maintenance closet under the ramp. My ledger is there now. Bring it back quiet. Do not read it.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 successMessageT: Good. That ledger has names, routes, and old debts. In the wrong hands, it becomes a knife pointed at my table. You kept your head down and brought it back clean. That matters.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 failMessageText: You lost the ledger or made too much noise chasing it. Neither one builds trust.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 acceptPlayerMes: I'll bring the ledger back clean.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 declinePlayerMe: I'm not touching Ground Zero for you yet.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba916 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the ledger recovered quietly from Ground Zero before the wrong people find it.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba917: Locate the maintenance closet under the ramp on Ground Zero
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba919: Survive and extract from Ground Zero
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b description: The Concordia ledger still has a useful name in it. Useful names become useful debts if you handle them right. One of my runners left a sealed envelope in the Factory office building, second-floor locker room. You move it to Ground Zero. Underground level, meat truck, far back. The man collecting it works for Prapor. He does not need your face, your voice, or my name. Do not open it. Do not lose it. Do not bring it back to me. A dead drop works because everyone follows the rules.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b note: Move Tony's sealed envelope from the Factory office locker room to the Ground Zero underground meat truck dead drop.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b startedMessageT: Factory office, second-floor locker room. Take the envelope. Then Ground Zero, underground meat truck, far back. Leave it there and walk away.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b successMessageT: There it is. The envelope is where it belongs. Prapor's man will remember what he owes, and he will not know whose hand moved the paper. That is how a debt stays useful.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b failMessageText: You lost the envelope, lost the road, or forgot the rules. Dead drops do not forgive stupid hands.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b declinePlayerMe: I'm not running your dead drops yet.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91b changeQuestMess: Tony wants the sealed envelope moved through a quiet courier line.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91c: Locate the sealed envelope in the Factory office locker room
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba91f: Stash Tony's sealed envelope in the Ground Zero meat truck
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba920: Survive and extract from Ground Zero
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 description: Names are dangerous. Symbols last longer. Take my card to Factory and leave it in the third-floor office, on the desk where people will see it. No signatures, no speeches, no bodies in Scav jackets. Fence opened the first door for you, and I do not repay useful workers with dead workers. Plant the card, walk out, and say nothing. My name starts meaning something when people learn the rules without hearing them twice.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 note: Plant Tony's calling card on the Factory third-floor office desk without killing Scavs.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 startedMessageT: Factory. Third-floor office. Card on the desk. Scavs stay breathing. That part is not optional.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 successMessageT: You listened. The card is on the desk, and the Scavs are still breathing. Good. The right people will see the mark and understand there is a new table in Tarkov.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 failMessageText: I asked for a mark, not a pile of dead Scavs. A body sends the wrong message when I am teaching rules.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 declinePlayerMe: I'm not going quiet into Factory yet.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba926 changeQuestMess: Tony wants his calling card planted on Factory without Scav blood on it.
6a3007dfd2999bc7b9bba9b3: Locate the third-floor office on Factory
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba927: Plant Tony's calling card on the third-floor office desk on Factory
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba929: Do not kill any Scavs on Factory
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 description: The card was seen. Now comes the bill. Customs has roads for men who hate checkpoints, offices for goods with no paperwork, dorm rooms where cash changes hands, and gas stations where deals get settled behind locked doors. Big Red keeps the paper. Three-story Dorms keeps the dirty money. New Gas keeps the lane moving. Hit all three points, make sure the collection line still answers, then bring me my cut in cash and gold. This is not robbery. This is tax. You keep the collector's fee.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 note: Check Tony's Customs collection route at Big Red, three-story Dorms, and New Gas, then bring back his cut.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 startedMessageT: Customs. Big Red upstairs office, three-story Dorms near marked room, New Gas office. Check the line, collect the cut, and come back alive.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 successMessageT: Good. Big Red, Dorms, New Gas. The line is open and the bill got paid. Keep your collector's fee. Respect is cheaper than bullets, but bullets still collect interest.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 failMessageText: You lost the lane, lost the money, or forgot whose tax you were collecting. None of that makes my name heavier.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 declinePlayerMe: I'm not collecting from Customs yet.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa32 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the Customs collection line checked and his cut brought back in cash and gold.
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa33: Locate the upstairs Big Red office collection point
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa34: Locate the three-story Dorms marked room collection point
6a30a341d2999bc7b9bbaa35: Locate the New Gas office collection point
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 description: The Customs line pays again. Good. But money is useless if every road is watched by someone else's eyes. Before Tarkov broke open, BEAR teams used paths through Woods that never touched the main roads. Old military checkpoint, Scav bunker near the mountain, Grandma's House outskirts. Those paths were quiet once. I want to know if they can carry my people now. Mark them, make it back, and do not waste time looking for souvenirs. We are not sightseeing. We are drawing the map for something bigger.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 note: Mark three old BEAR route points on Woods and survive.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 startedMessageT: Woods. Old military checkpoint, Scav bunker near the mountain, Grandma's House outskirts. Mark the old BEAR paths. Come back breathing.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 successMessageT: Now we have road. The old marks have new teeth, and my crew can move where other men are too scared to look. You can follow ghosts. Good skill for this business.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 failMessageText: You lost the trail. That is how men disappear in Woods, and missing men do not build routes.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 declinePlayerMe: I'm not walking old BEAR trails yet.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa96 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the old BEAR paths on Woods marked for future movement.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa97: Mark the old BEAR route near the old military checkpoint
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa98: Mark the old BEAR route near the Scav bunker by the mountain
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaa99: Mark the old BEAR route near Grandma's House outskirts
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 description: The old trails are open. That means people can move again, and movement needs product. One of mine left two sealed military weapon crates in the E2 bunkers on Reserve. He does not know your name, and you do not know his. That is how this business stays alive. Find the buried cache, recover both crates, and bring them to me with the seals intact. If a seal is cut or one crate is missing, do not bother making excuses. You will only be explaining the price.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 note: Recover two sealed military weapon crates from the Reserve E2 bunkers for Tony.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 startedMessageT: Reserve. E2 bunkers. Two sealed crates were left for my side. Recover both and make it back.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 successMessageT: Both crates are sealed. Good. That means the line can carry product, and you can carry it without asking questions. I pulled some loose steel from another box for you. Do not mistake payment for kindness.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 failMessageText: A missing crate, a broken seal, or a dead courier. None of those help my business.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 declinePlayerMe: I'm not going into E2 for crates yet.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab5 changeQuestMess: Tony wants both sealed crates recovered from the Reserve E2 bunkers with the seals intact.
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab6: Locate the buried weapons cache in the Reserve E2 bunkers
6a30b2fbd2999bc7b9bbaab9: Hand over 2 sealed military weapon crates to Tony
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 description: The crates moved. The roads opened. Then someone hit one of my couriers near Interchange. He made it inside ULTRA before my crew reached him, and they used Mantis as a quick triage point. Smart choice. Medical store, closed doors, enough clutter to hide behind. They pulled him out, but not everything came with them. There is a sealed trauma bag still inside Mantis. I want it back. This is not medicine for sale. This is how useful men keep breathing, and useful men are expensive to replace.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 note: Recover Tony's sealed trauma bag from the improvised triage point inside Mantis on Interchange.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 startedMessageT: Interchange. Mantis, inside ULTRA. Find the triage point, recover the trauma bag, and get out alive.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 successMessageT: That will do. Bag is back. My boys keep breathing, and the road stays open. Safe hands are worth paying for.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 failMessageText: You lost the bag or let Interchange eat your time. Dead couriers are expensive. Lost supplies are worse.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 declinePlayerMe: I'm not going to Interchange for this yet.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab29 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the Mantis triage point checked and the trauma bag recovered from Interchange.
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab2d: Locate Tony's improvised triage point inside Mantis
6a3210dbd2999bc7b9bbab35: Hand over Tony's sealed trauma bag
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b description: The bags moved, the crates moved, and now the coast is listening. Someone has a contact line on Lighthouse, and they are using satellite equipment to watch movement I would rather keep quiet. I do not need them dead. Dead men get replaced, and replacements ask questions. I need them blind. Take these Signal Jammers. Place one near the satellite equipment at the tennis court and another at the first helipad. Once their equipment starts screaming, my runners can move without every clean-dollar errand boy hearing about it.
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b note: Place Signal Jammers near Lighthouse satellite communication equipment for Tony.
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b startedMessageT: Lighthouse. Tennis court satellites, then the first helipad. Plant the jammers and walk out. Blind is better than dead today.
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b successMessageT: Good. Their radios will not be clean for a while. When the coast goes quiet, my hands can move and my name does not travel with them.
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b failMessageText: You lost the jammers, missed the equipment, or let Lighthouse chew you up. That does not blind anyone.
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b declinePlayerMe: I'm not touching Lighthouse comms yet.
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6b changeQuestMess: Tony wants Signal Jammers placed near Lighthouse satellite equipment to blind the coast.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa7: Place the first Signal Jammer near the satellite equipment at the tennis court
6a39bb7182d8dd83f87b1f6d: Place the second Signal Jammer near the satellite equipment at the first helipad
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 description: Bullets open doors, but paper keeps them open. My side is moving more now, and moving men need names, manifests, stamps, and lies that look official under bad light. There is a packet of forged route documents hidden in the guard office of two-story Dorms on Customs. Bring it to me with the seal intact. If you read it, you will only learn names that are bad for your health. Paper like this turns crime into cargo, and cargo is easier to move.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 note: Recover Tony's forged route documents from the guard office in two-story Dorms.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 startedMessageT: Customs. Two-story Dorms. Guard office. Find the forged documents and leave on your feet.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 successMessageT: Paper shields. A stamp in the right place can stop more bullets than armor. Now my roads look cleaner to men who only read labels.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 failMessageText: You lost the papers or let Dorms eat you. Without documents, every road looks like a crime scene.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 declinePlayerMe: I'm not going into Dorms for papers yet.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 completePlayerM: Here are the forged route documents.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f84 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the forged route documents recovered from two-story Dorms.
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f88: Locate the guard office in two-story Dorms
6a39bce282d8dd83f87b1f90: Hand over the forged route documents
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa9 description: The radios are blind and the papers are clean enough to pass under bad light. Now we test the lane with cargo that matters. I am giving you three sealed packages. Customs, Interchange, Streets. One package for each cache. Do not open them, do not lose them, and do not ask what they are worth. If one disappears, you replace the value yourself before you finish the job. Every route needs one clean run before people trust it with real money.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa9 note: Stash three sealed cargo packages across Tony's Customs, Interchange, and Streets route.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa9 startedMessageT: Three packages. Train car near Fortress, Goshan flatbed, LexOs container. Keep the run quiet and the seals intact.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa9 successMessageT: Customs opened, Interchange moved, Streets received. That is a proper run. Now I know the road answers when I call, and other men will learn to respect the schedule.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa9 failMessageText: Lost cargo, broken lane, dead courier. None of that pays, and none of it builds trust.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fa9 changeQuestMess: Tony wants three sealed cargo packages stashed across the route.
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1faa: Stash the first sealed cargo package in the train car near Fortress
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fab: Stash the second sealed cargo package in the flatbed truck at the back of Goshan
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fad: Stash the third sealed cargo package in the closed container behind LexOs
6a39fcff82d8dd83f87b1fb1: Survive and extract from Customs, Interchange, and Streets
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b description: The quiet run worked. Now we look for heavier freight. Interchange has locked containers tied to old access cards, 21WS and 11SR. People think a locked door means ownership. It does not. It means someone was afraid of losing what was inside. Take these markers, tag both containers, and leave. My crew will handle the cutting and hauling after you are gone. We are not stealing from Interchange. We are correcting who it belongs to.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b note: Mark the locked 21WS and 11SR shipment containers on Interchange for Tony's crew.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b startedMessageT: Interchange. Two locked containers. 21WS and 11SR. Mark them and leave alive. My crew handles the ugly part.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b successMessageT: The freight is tagged, and the men I trust know where to cut. Locked doors only slow honest men. We are not honest men.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b failMessageText: The containers are still unmarked. Cold freight does not move itself, and my crew does not cut blind.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b declinePlayerMe: I'm not touching locked freight yet.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209b changeQuestMess: Tony wants the locked Interchange freight containers marked for his crew.
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209c: Mark the locked 21WS shipment container for Tony's crew
6a415fe582d8dd83f87b209d: Mark the locked 11SR shipment container for Tony's crew
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 description: A dead drop is not a trash can. You do not empty it, you do not stand over it, and you do not come back twice if someone is watching. I need to know you understand that before I put better goods in your hands. Woods has two old drops still worth using. Check the first drop, recover the coded dog tag, move it to the second drop, and leave alive. One raid. No excuses. Rules keep business moving. Break them and the whole table bleeds.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 note: Move Tony's coded dead-drop tag between two Woods dead drops and extract alive.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 startedMessageT: Woods. First drop, coded tag, second drop. One raid. Move quiet and leave alive.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 successMessageT: You followed the rules. The tag moved, the path stayed quiet, and nobody had to say your name. That is how couriers live long enough to get paid twice.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 failMessageText: You lost the tag, missed the drop, or died walking the road. That is not how couriers survive, and it is not how trust gets built.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 declinePlayerMe: I'm not running dead drops yet.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d4 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the coded dead-drop tag moved between two Woods drops in one raid.
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20d8: Locate the first dead drop on Woods
6a417a6c82d8dd83f87b20dc: Stash Tony's coded dead-drop tag at the second dead drop
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa description: Clean weapons are for men with supply lines. Out here, sometimes you get a tired barrel, weak springs, bad feed lips, and a little oil holding the whole thing together. Factory is perfect for this lesson. No long walks. No soft angles. No time to blame the gun. Take a worn-down weapon into the plant and put PMCs down with it. If it jams, clear it. If it kicks wrong, hold it tighter. If it fails, make it work anyway. I am not building a crew out of men who need perfect tools.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa startedMessageT: Factory. Worn-down weapon. Leave proof on the floor. Bad steel still works in steady hands.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa successMessageT: Now you understand something most people learn too late. A clean weapon is comfort. A working weapon is a decision. You kept bad steel alive long enough to do business. That means I can trust you with gear that has already seen bad days.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa failMessageText: The weapon was rough. Factory was worse. That was the point. Bring me results, not excuses.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa declinePlayerMe: I'm not testing broken steel yet.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa changeQuestMess: Tony wants PMC kills on Factory with a worn-down weapon.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20fa note: Kill PMCs on Factory while using a damaged or low-durability weapon, then survive the raid.
6a41d30482d8dd83f87b20ff: Eliminate PMCs on Factory while using a low-durability weapon
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e description: The coast is full of clean rifles, polished plates, and clean lies. Rogues move Western parts through Lighthouse like the beach belongs to them. It does not. Every shore has an owner once someone strong enough says so. I want material and I want proof. Bring me Western weapons, bring me Rogue kit, mark the beach shipment, and pull the shipment records from the lower-floor bunk room in Warehouse 3. My boys will handle the heavy cargo after you leave.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e note: Bring Tony Western weapons, Rogue tactical gear, mark the beach shipment, and recover shipment evidence from Warehouse 3.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e startedMessageT: Lighthouse. Take what they brought, mark what they hide, and pull the paper trail from Warehouse 3.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e successMessageT: Foreign parts, foreign lies, same old greed. Now I know what they move, where it touches the beach, and what can be pulled apart for my shelves. The coast just got smaller for them.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e failMessageText: You missed the shipment, lost the evidence, or came back without material. The coast does not get quieter because you tried.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e acceptPlayerMes: I'll hit the Rogue supply line.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e declinePlayerMe: I'm not touching Rogue freight yet.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e completePlayerM: I brought the gear and the evidence.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829e changeQuestMess: Tony wants Rogue supply gear and shipment evidence from Lighthouse.
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe9829f: Find 2 Western weapons in raid and hand them over
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe982a0: Find 3 pieces of Rogue tactical gear in raid and hand them over
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe982a1: Mark the Rogue shipment on the beach for Tony's crew
6a4341ac38a6d33bffe982a2: Recover the Rogue shipment evidence from the Warehouse 3 lower floor bunk room
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 changeQuestMess: Tony wants Glukhar and two guards eliminated to close the bunker debt.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 declinePlayerMe: Then stay out of the bunker routes.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 failMessageText: Glukhar is still breathing, or his guards still think the bunker belongs to them. That debt is not closed.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 startedMessageT: Reserve. Bunker line. Glukhar and two of his guards. Close the debt and come back breathing.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 successMessageT: Good. That debt is closed. Glukhar thought the bunker made him untouchable. His guards thought standing near him made them important. Now the route is quiet again. You did not just kill men. You corrected the price of doing business with me. The next room is open.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 description: You want better stock? Then you handle better problems. Reserve has an old route of mine under it. Bunker line. Used to move rifles, armor, medical crates, whatever people paid for. Glukhar's boys found it and started charging tax on my name. I paid once. That was business. They asked again. That was disrespect. You go there, find Glukhar, and put him down. Two of his guards too. I do not want a rumor. I want a message. Come back breathing, and maybe I show you what I keep behind the next door.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba916 note: Eliminate Glukhar and two of his guards on Reserve, then survive and extract. This closes Tony's LL2 bunker debt and pushes the player toward LL3.
6a301016d2999bc7b9bba91c: Eliminate 2 of Glukhar's guards on Reserve
